text.title: Performance Testing Tools: k6 and Locust Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the perf-test-tools methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: pick-tool
step.input: Team language + need for distributed runs
step.action: k6 if JS/TS + single-box; Locust if Python + distributed + web UI.

step.name: scaffold-script
step.action: Generate k6-load.js or locustfile.py with stages + thresholds derived from baselines.json.

step.name: wire-staging
step.action: Pin BASE_URL to staging; install fixture loader (warm DB + cache).

step.name: ci-gate
step.action: Add ci-perf-gate.yml; ensure exit code propagates.

step.name: html-report-artifact
step.action: Save HTML report as a CI artifact for human triage.
